name: Agent Junction
description: MCP server enabling encrypted peer-to-peer communication between Claude Code instances on localhost or LAN.

name: AI Attribution
description: Adds a transparent human-AI attribution section to a project README, documenting which parts of the work were human-authored and which were AI-assisted or AI-generated.

name: AI Ideation Runs
description: Public archive of structured AI ideation sessions run via Claude Code — each `/run` takes a topic and saves a dated batch of ideas with name, summary, category, feasibility/impact ratings, considerations, and next steps.

name: AI Memory Planning 0426
description: Planning notes and architecture diagrams exploring three complementary methods for building a personal AI memory system over a vector store — passive distillation from chat, agentic interviews, and manual curation.

name: AI-Human Attribution Adder
description: Adds AI/human attribution sections to README files for transparent tool usage documentation.

name: Bash Alias Manager
description: Claude Code plugin for managing bash aliases — add, edit, delete, prune, ideate, and back up ~/.bash_aliases using a guided workflow.

name: Bash Alias Manager Claude
description: Workspace for managing bash aliases with YADM synchronization support.

name: Batch ClaudeMD Repo Creator
description: Automation workspace for batch-adding CLAUDE.md files across multiple GitHub repositories.

name: Bug Catcher
description: Slash commands for rapid Linux system bug capture and diagnosis — check fresh logs the moment an issue occurs.

name: Claude Agent Blueprints
description: Curated collection of 75+ agent workspace templates organized by use case, demonstrating the Agent Workspace Model across code and non-code domains.

name: Claude Agent Picker Pattern
description: Framework for assembling context-optimized multi-agent crews with minimal overlap.

name: Claude Agent Workspace Generator
description: Launchpad for creating standardized workspace templates conforming to the Agent Workspace Model v1.1 spec, with slash commands to generate, validate, and publish new workspaces.

name: Claude App Optimiser
description: Slash command deploying a sub-agent for codebase optimization and dead code removal.

name: Claude Bug Catcher
description: Hotkey-triggered utility that launches Claude Code with relevant logs for real-time Linux debugging.

name: Claude Calls The Shots
description: Flips Claude Code into autonomous, action-first mode — ships a per-session `/calls-the-shots` slash command plus an optional always-on snippet injected into `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md`.

name: Claude Change My View
description: Workspace for challenging personal beliefs through AI-generated counterarguments and rebuttals.

name: Claude Code Bash Aliases
description: Collection of bash aliases for common Claude Code operations on Linux.

name: Claude Code Bugs And FRs
description: Staging area for Claude Code bug reports and feature requests before filing upstream at anthropics/claude-code.

name: Claude Code Context Feature Requests
description: Feature requests for improving Claude Code's context handling capabilities.

name: Claude Code Context Toolkit
description: Bridges human-friendly CONTEXT.md files with AI-optimized CLAUDE.md briefings via slash commands.

name: Claude Code Feedback
description: Self-healing helper for filing well-formed bug reports, feature requests, model-behavior reports, and documentation issues against anthropics/claude-code. Fetches the live GitHub issue-form templates on every run so submissions always match Anthropic's current required fields.

name: Claude Code Linux Desktop Slash Commands
description: System administration slash commands for Linux desktop environments.

name: Claude Code Linux Notes
description: Personal documentation of workflows and tips for using Claude Code on Ubuntu with KDE Plasma.

name: Claude Code Marketplace Hub
description: Decentralized directory aggregating multiple community-maintained Claude Code plugin marketplaces.

name: Claude Code MCP Command Generator
description: Generator for creating MCP server configuration commands for Claude Code.

name: Claude Code MCP List
description: Curated index of MCP servers organized into 14+ categories for extending Claude Code.

name: Claude Code Plugin (Meta)
description: Meta-plugin for managing Claude Code configuration, slash commands, and agent development.

name: Claude Code Plugins Marketplace
description: Centralized marketplace for discovering and installing Claude Code plugins — source of truth for the [Plugins section](./plugins.md).

name: Claude Code Repo Managers ClaudeMD
description: Pre-configured CLAUDE.md templates for managing different repository types.

name: Claude Code What Thing
description: Decision support for choosing the right Claude Code primitive — skill, subagent, slash command, plugin, MCP server, hook, or output style — based on what you're trying to build. Grounded in the official Anthropic docs, personalised by stored user context.

name: Claude Deep Research Model (Notes / Documentation)
description: Framework for iterative deep research using Claude with voice pipeline and structured outputs.

name: Claude Development Agents
description: Curated toolkit of 74+ Claude Code configurations for development workflows and multi-agent coordination.

name: Claude Document This
description: Methods and slash commands for documenting system changes made by Claude Code.

name: Claude Dolphin & Konsole Actions
description: KDE Dolphin right-click context menu actions (service menus) for launching Claude Code in various Konsole window layouts, including single terminal, split panes, and multi-instance grids.

name: Claude Dork
description: Agent that generates platform-specific search dorks across Google, Reddit, Twitter/X, and more.

name: Claude File Organiser Super Slash
description: Slash command that transforms disorganized filesystems into well-structured directories.

name: Claude Interview
description: Transcript from an Anthropic user research interview on AI tools and adoption.

name: Claude Is Awesome
description: Template for creating curated resource lists with automated formatting and badge generation.

name: Claude Janitor
description: Repository cleanup toolkit with automated operations for removing clutter, organizing structure, and polishing documentation.

name: Claude Local AI Agent Research
description: Research into agentic AI tools optimized for system administration rather than code generation.

name: Claude MD Chunk
description: Slash command that condenses bloated CLAUDE.md files to essentials and organizes supplementary context into a structured `agent-context/` folder.

name: Claude Model Identifier
description: Prompt template for verifying the correct Claude model variant at conversation start.

name: Claude Rescue
description: Concept for deploying Claude Code into recovery shell environments for AI-assisted system repair.

name: Claude Slash Commands
description: General-purpose slash command library for various Claude Code workflows.

name: Claude Sub-Agent Network
description: Collection of system prompts and configurations for development, operational, and creative tasks.

name: Claude System Recovery Mode
description: Custom GRUB boot entry integrating Claude CLI into Linux system recovery workflows. Projects specifically targeting KDE Plasma desktop integration and Linux desktop workflows with Claude Code.

name: Claude Task Manager
description: Sequential task queuing system addressing context window exhaustion in agentic coding tools.

name: Claude Templatizer
description: Turn a set of existing Claude Code workspace repos into a reusable GitHub template repo by extracting their commonalities.

name: Claude User Manual
description: Plugin for generating personalized user manuals and private documentation for codebases.

name: Claude User Memory
description: Persistent cross-session memory about the user, backed by Mem0. Two isolated contexts (personal and work) with three skills for recall, save, and end-of-session commit.

name: Claude Website Update Sender
description: Automated workflow for sending polished update emails about website changes via Resend MCP.

name: Claude Workspace Setup Helper
description: Interactive tool for discovering, selecting, and cloning Claude Workspace templates.

name: ClaudeMD Chunker
description: Slash command that prunes bloated CLAUDE.md files to their essentials and offloads supplementary context into an agent-context/ folder.

name: CONTEXT.md
description: Workflow methodology for separating human-authored context from structured AI agent briefings.

name: Cool Claude Code Stuff
description: Curated collection of Claude Code projects and resources organized by category.

name: Declaude
description: Personalized text rewriting rules that consolidate into a slash command for refining AI-generated documentation.

name: Fix Documentation
description: Claude Code plugin for automated technical documentation generation and code documentation workflows.

name: How-To-MCP
description: Guide for instructing AI agents on how to provision and manage MCP server connections according to user-specific preferences, with a tiered decision matrix.

name: Hp5200 Printer
description: HP DeskJet 5200 printer and scanner operations — ink levels, color/B&W printing, scanning, auto-discovery. A simple demo of local AI agent hardware integration.

name: Linux Desktop ClaudeMD Seeder
description: Automatically generates contextual CLAUDE.md files across a Linux desktop filesystem.

name: Local Claude Plugin Install Research
description: Research and notes on installing Claude Code plugins locally rather than through the marketplace.

name: Make Agent Friendly
description: Prepares human-developed codebases for agentic development with structured refactoring, CLAUDE.md creation, and agent-friendly infrastructure.

name: MCP Command Generator
description: Natural language MCP server installation assistant for Claude Code. Generates and optionally executes valid 'claude mcp add' commands from plain English descriptions, backed by a curated server catalog and syntax reference.

name: MCPM Claude Code Docs
description: Documentation for integrating Claude Code with MCPM external MCP server manager.

name: New Repo From Template
description: Create new GitHub repos from a built-in curated template library AND the user's own templates (GitHub public/private or local directories). Match-by-intent and recommendation skills search both pools; configure-template-sources skill discovers and caches user templates.

name: New Repo From Template Plugin
description: Claude Code plugin that scaffolds new workspaces from a catalogue of 80+ template repositories spanning development, research, legal, finance, infrastructure, planning, writing, personal, knowledge, and simulation workflows. Each template is also available as a standalone GitHub repo for direct forking — the plugin simply provides a faster, unified way to instantiate them locally. See the plugin's [templates manifest](https://github.com/danielrosehill/New-Repo-From-Template-Plugin/blob/master/templates/manifest.json) for the full list.

name: New Turn Claude Hook
description: Tool that determines whether to continue an AI conversation or start fresh for optimal context.

name: New Turn Hook
description: Evaluates whether the current conversation context is still useful or whether the user should start a fresh conversation to avoid context bloat and degraded performance.

name: No Wheel Inventions
description: Slash commands encouraging use of existing libraries instead of building custom solutions.

name: Non-Code Claude Code
description: Showcase of creative Claude Code applications beyond traditional software development.

name: Private And Public Claude MD
description: Tools for managing public and private CLAUDE.md files with security-focused git configuration.

name: QA Team
description: A multi-agent QA system for comprehensive code review and quality validation with specialized agents for general QA, cleanup, documentation, API review, performance optimization, and deployment review.

name: Repo Retrofitter
description: Bulk-retrofit repositories with AI agent scaffolding (CLAUDE.md, slash commands, subagents, MCP recommendations). Supports scan, interactive, and fully autonomous modes.

name: Security Checkup
description: Claude Code plugin for security audits, vulnerability scanning, firewall configuration, and system security hardening workflows.

name: Session Transfer
description: Transfer a Claude Code session to a fresh instance — full context transfer via a structured HANDOVER.md (with a dedicated writer subagent), or quick-jump skills for spawning a sibling Konsole/Claude window at the current directory.

name: Skill Creation Research
description: Research and notes on designing and authoring Claude Code skills.

name: Smithery Claude Code MCP Jumpstarter
description: Curated collection of 35+ MCP servers with interactive installer across 15+ categories.

name: Tech Docs
description: Claude Code plugin for documentation generation, technical writing, README creation, and documentation management workflows.

name: The User Voice Types
description: CLAUDE.md snippets and slash commands telling Claude to silently infer around transcription errors from voice typing and stray keystrokes from one-handed or distracted typing.

name: Workspace Setup
description: Interactive assistant for discovering and cloning Claude Code workspace templates. Asks about your objectives, recommends relevant workspaces from a curated catalog, and clones them to a directory of your choice.
